infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Coconut uses your camera to take group photos and scan receipts.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Coconut uses your photo library to select group photos and receipts.
infoPlist.NSContactsUsageDescription: Coconut uses your contacts to help you quickly add friends to split expenses with.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Coconut uses Face ID to securely unlock the app and protect your financial data.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: This app uses Bluetooth to connect to supported card readers.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothPeripheralUsageDescription: Bluetooth access is required in order to connect to supported bluetooth card readers.
infoPlist.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: This app uses the local WiFi network to connect to supported card readers.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Location access is required to accept payments.
